description: Определяет scope (область видимости) для каждой группы правил wiki. Помогает агенту управлять контекстом сессии — знать какие правила помнить, а какие читать только на время процесса.

persistent.label: Весь контекст сессии
persistent.rule: Agent remembers these rules for entire session. Read once at session start. Never forget during session.

transient.label: Только во время процесса (read → forget)
transient.rule: Agent reads these rules when entering process mode. After process completes, agent forgets them unless user explicitly asks to keep context.

rules_to_include_in_context.title: Ingest-specific steps: capture → integrate flow, corrected copy zone, delta tracking manifest
Query-specific: search priority, web_ingest_flow, compounding workflow logic
Lint-specific: check IDs, cron setup, script usage patterns

hybrid.label: Частичная persistence (read infrequently but remember)
hybrid.rule: Agent remembers these rules but reads them from source files only when needed. Don't keep in context unless actively working on that topic.

rules_to_include_in_context.title: Link Conventions — basic rules remember, detailed auto-fix read from source
Advisory Locking usage pattern for ingest

session_start: Read persistent rules from AGENTS.md — these are always in context.
Do NOT read transient rules at session start. Only read when entering process mode.
Hybrid rules: remember but don't keep full content in context. Read source only when actively working on that topic.
process_start: When starting ingest → read process-ingest.json (transient rules).
When starting query → read process-query.json (transient rules).
When starting lint → read process-lint.json (transient rules).
After process completes → forget transient rules unless user asks to keep context.
forget_trigger: User says 'done', 'clear context', or 'забь' → clear transient rules from memory.
Persistent rules never forgotten during session.
